result:
Boids simulation created and verified. Open index.html in any modern browser to run.

Files:
- index.html
- style.css
- scripts/boids.js
- scripts/main.js

Notes:
- No build tools or external libraries used.
- Scripts are wired via <script src> tags in correct order (boids.js before main.js).
- Canvas fills the viewport; 400+ fast, rainbow-colored boids render on a 2D canvas with performant spatial grid neighbor search.
- JavaScript passes static wiring checks; globals are exposed without ES modules.
